rehabilitative and restorative service provider category; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: RT_DEVMTL_REHAB_RSTRTV_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: RT_DEVMTL_REHAB_RSTRTV_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
221700000X: Art therapist 
222Q00000X: Developmental therapist 
222Z00000X:
